# Flow AI

> Flow AI helps small businesses automate repetitive tasks, boost productivity, and scale operations using smart, customized AI workflows. We design and implement AI strategy, agents, and workflows to drive measurable results.

## Contact

- Website: https://thisisflowai.com/
- Contact: https://thisisflowai.com/contact/
- Email: accessibility@thisisflowai.com (accessibility inquiries)

## Services

- AI consulting and strategy
- Custom AI workflows and automation
- AI training for teams (5–100 people)
- Implementation of AI agents and tools

## Key pages

- Home: https://thisisflowai.com/
- Solutions: https://thisisflowai.com/solutions/
- Use cases: https://thisisflowai.com/use-cases/
- Resources (lessons, agents, GPTs, prompt packs): https://thisisflowai.com/resources/

- FAQ: https://thisisflowai.com/faq/
- Contact: https://thisisflowai.com/contact/
- Book a call: https://thisisflowai.com/book-call/
- Accessibility: https://thisisflowai.com/accessibility/
- Privacy & terms: https://thisisflowai.com/privacy-terms/

## About

Flow AI is an AI consulting company based in Greenwich, CT. We focus on real-world business automation: lead follow-up, invoicing, onboarding, support, and core process workflows.
